claims.text: 39. A method for treating an ectoparasite in a mammal, comprising the step of topically applying to a mammal a therapeutically effective amount of the composition of claim 12 .

use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS INFECTED WITH PEDICULUS HUMANUS CAPITIS (HEAD LICE AND THEIR OVA) OF THE SCALP HAIR

indications.text:
OVIDE Lotion is indicated for patients infected with Pediculus humanus capitis (head lice and their ova) of the
scalp hair.
